mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, subtitle, is_leaf, sort_order FROM category ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, ''), sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, name, subtitle, is_leaf, sort_order FROM category WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), 0) FROM category WHERE (parent_id = #{parentId} OR (parent_id IS NULL AND #{parentId} IS NULL))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category ( id, parent_id, name, subtitle, is_leaf, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{leaf}, #{sortOrder} )
